Unauthenticated admin-listener probe or metrics route.
Unauthenticated admin-listener probe or metrics route.
Admin listener posture route for dedicated read-only operations credentials.
Admin listener governed config verification route. It validates a candidate config and reports whether a restart would be required; it does not apply break-glass requests.
Admin listener governed config dry-run route. It validates a candidate config and reports apply compatibility without swapping runtime state; it does not apply break-glass requests.

Admin listener governed signed config apply route. Inline candidates are rejected for apply; signed TUF targets can live-apply compatible changes and require explicit break-glass approval fields for emergency rollback bypass.
